'''''Star Wars'' 20''' is the twentieth and final issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2013)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Brian Wood]], illustrated by [[Carlos D'Anda]] and [[Gabe Eltaeb]], and first published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[August 13]], [[2014]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Leia risks it all for a friend she hasn't seen since childhood! Han, Luke, and Chewie risk it all for Leia!''

''Brian Wood and Carlos D'Anda say farewell to that galaxy far, far away before they send our heroes to an unknown fate!''

==Opening crawl==
{{OpeningCrawl
|name=STAR WARS
|text=A message is received from Princes Leia's
childhood friend Seren Song—a Rebel agent
who went undercover in the very earliest
days of the Rebellion. Seren has been out of
contact for so long that there is no way to
know if she can still be trusted, but Leia is
willing to give her friend a chance.

But while en route to Seren's location, the
Millennium Falcon, carrying the Princess,
Luke Skywalker, Han Solo, and Chewbacca,
is attacked by the infamous droid bounty
hunter IG-88.

While the crew has been forced to flee,
searching for a safe place to effect
repairs on the Falcon, the doubts about
Seren and the strain of the mission are
taking their toll…}}
